name: HARADOU: HAKUTOU (WAY OF PURIFICATION: WHITE SWORD)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 4

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, E

You create one hakutou, a glowing white cross-shaped dagger that weighs nothing and deals 1d4 piercing damage, as well as 3d4 holy damage that is not multiplied on critical hits. The weapon is considered to be a dagger, and benefits from modifiers you may have to such a weapon.

If it hits an evil creature, a hakutou creates a brilliant glow for a moment. If it hits a non-evil creature, it deals no damage. In either case, once it hits, it disintegrates.

Empower: Spend 3 Chakra to create an additional hakutou (up to 1 per 3 levels or 5 total, whichever is lower).
